title: Shooter
description: Defines the entity's ranged attack behavior. The "minecraft:behavior.ranged_attack" goal uses this component to determine which projectiles to shoot.

sound.title: Sound
sound.description:
Sound that is played when the shooter shoots a projectile.

Sample values:
• bogged: bow
• drowned: item.trident.throw

aux_val.title: Aux Val
aux_val.description:
ID of the Potion effect for the default projectile to be applied on hit.

Sample values:
• bogged: 26

def.title: Def
def.description:
Actor definition to use as the default projectile for the ranged attack. The actor definition must have the projectile component to be able to be shot as a projectile.

Sample values:
• blaze: minecraft:small_fireball
• bogged: minecraft:arrow
• drowned: minecraft:thrown_trident

magic.title: Magic
magic.description: Sets whether the projectiles being used are flagged as magic. If set, the ranged attack goal will not be used at the same time as other magic goals, such as minecraft:behavior.drink_potion

power.title: Power
power.description: Velocity in which the projectiles will be shot at. A power of 0 will be overwritten by the default projectile throw power.

projectiles.title: Projectiles
projectiles.description: List of projectiles that can be used by the shooter. Projectiles are evaluated in the order of the list; After a projectile is chosen, the rest of the list is ignored.
